extra.reason: Off-CPU anomaly explained: reproduced under samply wrapper (63-73% util) but vanished on plain /usr/bin/time execution (93-99% util) — artifact of samply's own sampling/post-processing overhead, not a crabscheme scheduler/paging/alloc issue. Doc: docs/measurements/2026-07-13-offcpu-anomaly.md, commit 65ccecd.
